title: eleocharis rivalis
intro: Eleocharis rivalis, also known as the variable spikerush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its reported anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis rivalis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
